items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are escalating rapidly, with AI now helping attackers move faster than ever — giving organisations less time to respond before damage is done. A new report highlights that recovery planning is becoming just as critical as prevention. Separately, hackers are actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall remote access devices, and research shows nearly 8 in 10 organisations have been hit by incidents involving known, fixable security flaws.

If your organisation uses SonicWall SMA devices, ensure they are patched immediately. More broadly, now is a good time to check that your data backups are working and tested — if ransomware hits, reliable backups are your best recovery option.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: 81% of Australian organisations already hit by AI security incidents, showing urgent need for local response.
